ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite name) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., satellite, drone) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor used */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., multispectral, hyperspectral) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the data source */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the sensor */,
  "spectral_bands" TEXT /* Information about the spectral bands supported by the sensor */,
  "capture_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor captures data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop class (e.g., Corn, Soybean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop class */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle" TEXT /* Typical growth cycle of the crop */,
  "nutritional_requirements" TEXT /* Information about the nutritional requirements of the crop */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Information about the crop's resistance to diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the remote sensing data entry */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the analysis report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the analysis */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* User who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_truth_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground truth observation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the remote sensing data entry */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the ground truth observation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop class observed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* User who conducted the observation */,
  "field_conditions" TEXT /* Information about the field conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ground_truth_data_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ground_truth_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crop_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data source

Contact information for inquiries about the data source
Information about the spectral bands supported by the sensor
